title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: The Equalizer 3
subTitle: As Robert McCall finds himself forming a new bond with the locals of an Italian town, the region's oppression by the Mafia triggers him to protect his people.

title: Charlie's Angels
subTitle: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Father Stu
subTitle: Upon suffering in an accident, an aspiring actor receives a vision guiding him to change his lifestyle. However, when he sets off to pursue the priesthood, a rare disease brings him more challenges.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
subTitle: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

title: When a Stranger Calls
subTitle: Jill, a teenage babysitter, gets anxious when she starts receiving ominous anonymous calls. However, nothing could prepare for the horror she faces when she finds out where the calls are coming from.

title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
subTitle: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under a former MMA star. Ultimately, they have to fight each other and also the traitor who hides among them.

title: Hancock
subTitle: A hard-living superhero who has fallen out of favor with the public enters into a questionable relationship with the wife of the public relations professional who's trying to repair his image.

title: Life
subTitle: As astronauts discover the first evidence of extra-terrestrial life on Mars, they begin realising that the life form is extremely intelligent and hostile.

title: Men in Black: International
subTitle: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
subTitle: The Spengler family must join forces with the original Ghostbusters to stop an ancient evil force from refreezing the world, whilst protecting their iconic New York City firehouse headquarters.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A documentary crew, who are on a mission to find a tribe named Shirishamas, help a snake hunter when they find him stranded. However, he forces them to risk their lives and hunt down an anaconda.

title: 2 Guns
subTitle: Two undercover agents, Robert and Michael, aim to expose Manny 'Papi' Greco, a drug lord. Unaware of each other's true identities, the two get into trouble when they finally meet Papi.

title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
subTitle: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
subTitle: The Angels track down rings containing the names of those in the FBI's witness protection programme. However, the witnesses begin to get murdered one by one.

title: Kraven the Hunter
subTitle: Prepped to be the successor of his father's drug empire, a near-death experience alters Sergei's physicality. Sergei now treads the path of vengeance as he hunts criminals.

title: Morbius
subTitle: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

title: XXX
subTitle: The US government recruits extreme sports athlete Xander Cage to infiltrate a Russian criminal ring, which is plotting the destruction of the world.

title: A Few Good Men
subTitle: A lawyer from the US military safeguards two US marines who are charged for killing a fellow marine and a colonel turns into the prime suspect.

title: The Man From Toronto
subTitle: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

title: Uncharted
subTitle: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
subTitle: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
subTitle: Spider-Man seeks the help of Doctor Strange to forget his exposed secret identity as Peter Parker. However, Strange's spell goes horribly wrong, leading to unwanted guests entering their universe.

title: Armored
subTitle: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

title: 28 Days Later
subTitle: After a mysterious virus wreaks havoc in the United Kingdom, a team of survivors tries to cope with the aftermath of the disaster and find security.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

title: The Pope's Exorcist
subTitle: Father Gabriele Amorth, an exorcist, uncovers a hidden conspiracy as he investigates the horrifying possession of a young boy.

title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
subTitle: Harold's drawings spring to life when he ventures into the real world. His purple crayon accidentally creates challenges and he and his friends must safeguard both worlds.

title: Baby Driver
subTitle: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

title: Morbius
subTitle: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

title: Hollow Man
subTitle: Sebastian Caine, a scientist, develops an invisibility serum. However, when he uses it on himself and is unable to reverse the effects, it results in horrifying consequences.

title: Drunken Master
subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
subTitle: Peter Parker tries to stop the Vulture from selling weapons made with advanced Chitauri technology while trying to balance his life as an ordinary high school student.

title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
subTitle: When Van Helsing's invention goes awry, Johnny turns into a monster and Dracula becomes human. Later, they embark on a journey to find a cure before their transformations become permanent.

title: Brightburn
subTitle: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

title: Gran Turismo
subTitle: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

title: Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines
subTitle: John Connor, a cybernetic warrior from the future, travels back in time to accomplish his mission of protecting a man and his future wife, Kate, from a robotic attack.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Yaga bans Seth from using his magic because he can't control it. But, this ban makes it harder for Seth to stop the Bravery Quartet when they cause trouble at the academy.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
subTitle: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.
